title: Studies on Some Soluble Palladium(II) Chelates in Aqueous  Solution. Part III. Reddish Violet Chelate with Sodium  I-(o-Arsonophenylazo)-2-naphthol-3,6-disulphonate
author: Satendra P. Sangal
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A reddish violet 1:1 chelate between palladium(II) and sodium I-(o-arsonophenylszo)-2-naphthal-3,6- dieulphonate has been reported. The chelate (ʎ max  525 mµ) is stable between pH 1.0 and 12.0. The value of stability constant at pH 3.0 and at 25 °  is expressed by log K=4.4.
steps_raw: A reddish violet 1:1 chelate between palladium(II) and sodium I-(o-arsonophenylszo)-2-naphthal-3,6- dieulphonate has been reported. The chelate (ʎ max  525 mµ) is stable between pH 1.0 and 12.0. The value of stability constant at pH 3.0 and at 25 °  is expressed by log K=4.4.
